message:
test: add 13 feature component tests and fix swipe gesture threshold (bd-1vbi, bd-3fn4, bd-3af8, bd-3rpb)

Add test coverage for feature components:
- ratings: RatingDisplay (7 tests), Leaderboard (6 tests)
- history: HistoryTracker (4 tests)
- docs: CodeBlock + CodeTabs (9 tests), DocsPageLayout (9 tests)
- moderation: AppealStatus (9 tests), AppealForm (7 tests)
- pwa: InstallPrompt (6 tests)
- reporting: ReportDialog (6 tests)
- referral: ReferralShareModal (8 tests), ReferralCard (8 tests), ReferralStats (7 tests)
- swap-meet: CommunityPromptCard (10 tests)

Fix useSwipeGesture threshold test to account for velocity-based triggering.

Close beads: bd-1vbi, bd-3fn4, bd-3af8, bd-3rpb

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
